verification_email_sent: Your account has been created. A verification email has been sent.
verification_email_sent_with_support_hin: Your account has been created. A verification email has been sent. If it does not arrive, check your spam folder or contact destekerenesal@gmail.com.
verification_email_send_failed_but_accou: Your account has been created, but the verification email could not be sent right now. Please try again after logging in or contact destekerenesal@gmail.com.
social_login_not_configured: Social login is not configured yet.
delete_confirm: Do you want to delete this history record?
delete_error: History record could not be deleted
family_high_risk_title: Caution for children and sensitive individuals
family_high_risk_desc: The overall analysis of this product appears to be high risk. The ingredients should be reviewed carefully before regular use or consumption.
family_ecode_desc: High-risk additives were detected in this product. Children, allergic individuals, and users with special dietary needs should be careful.
family_beauty_usage_desc: For cosmetic products, frequency of use, skin type, and local sensitivity may be important.
alternative_food_title: You may prefer similar products with simpler ingredients
alternative_food_subtitle: Look for products with fewer additives or a higher analysis score.
alternative_beauty_title: Lower-risk cosmetic alternatives may be preferable
alternative_beauty_subtitle: Alternatives with a simpler ingredient list and similar intended use may be more suitable.
weekly_active_days: You have {{count}} active days in the last 7 days.
weekly_goal_done_message: You completed the weekly goal. Keep going for a new record.
weekly_goal_remaining_message: You can reach this week's goal with {{count}} more scans.
daily_mission_start: Do your first analysis of the day and start the daily mission.
daily_mission_remaining: You are very close to the goal. Only {{count}} more scans to go.
daily_mission_done_message: Today's goal is complete. You can keep discovering new products.
mission_today_1_text: Scan at least 3 products and improve ingredient awareness.
mission_today_2_text: Review additives in at least 1 product today.
mission_today_3_text: Scan a new product barcode and grow your history.
mission_today_4_text: Analyze products from 2 different categories in the same day.
insight_1_text: Ingredients listed first usually make up the largest portion of the product.
insight_2_text: The ingredient profile can vary significantly between products of the same brand. Review each product separately.
insight_3_text: High-risk additives may not affect every user the same way, but regular tracking helps make informed choices.
insight_4_text: A barcode country code does not always mean the true manufacturing origin; check product details as well.
missing_product_subtitle: If this barcode is not in the database, you can save product information and contribute to future versions.
draft_saved_message: The missing product report was saved as a draft. It can be used later for sync or admin review.
draft_helper_text: This record is stored locally as a draft. It can later be transferred through an admin panel or bulk sync.
draft_image_pending_message: The missing product report was sent to the Firebase contribution queue. The image could not be uploaded yet, so it was kept on the device and will be retried later.
required_product_name: Please fill in at least the product name.
draft_save_error: An error occurred while saving the draft.
product_image_helper: Add a clear photo of the product front or the package side where the barcode is visible.
camera_permission_required: Camera permission is required to take a photo.
media_library_permission_required: Media library permission is required to choose an image.
image_pick_error: An error occurred while selecting the product image. Please try again.
home_subtitle: Today’s barcode analysis summary, quick shortcuts, and premium operations surface live here.
favorite_products_subtitle: Star the products you revisit most and open them here in one tap.
favorites_load_error: Favorites could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.
favorites_empty: No favorite products yet. You can add favorites from the history screen with the star icon.
quick_rescan_subtitle: Use the shortcuts below to reopen the products you viewed recently.
quick_rescan_empty: Quick rescan shortcuts will appear here as your scan history grows.
rescan_shortcuts_error: Shortcuts could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.
recent_products_subtitle: Jump back into the products you scanned most recently.
settings_card_desc: Manage language, theme, and account preferences.
premium_subtitle: Premium unlocks an ad-free experience, unlimited barcode scans, and a more reliable operations surface.
benefit_silent_experience_text: Ads are suppressed so you can stay focused.
benefit_unlimited_volume_text: The daily scan limit is removed so your flow stays uninterrupted.
benefit_identity_sync_text: Entitlement tracking stays aligned across auth and restore flows.
purchase_surface_ready_text: The provider is on. Once the bundle, offering, and device billing layer are verified, the purchase sheet will open.
purchase_surface_setup_text: Once the dashboard and store packages are finished, this screen will open the purchase flow directly.
premium_active_text: Premium entitlement appears to be active on this account. Ads are suppressed and the scan limit is not applied.
purchase_provider_inactive: The purchase provider is not active yet
login_subtitle: Your first step toward healthier choices
signup_subtitle: Create your account and use barcode analyses with sync support.
fill_all_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
email_already_in_use: This email address is already in use.
signup_error_generic: An error occurred during sign up.
accept_kvkk_error: You must accept the KVKK notice to continue.
google_auth_missing: Google authentication credentials could not be obtained.
google_provider_disabled: Google sign-in is not enabled in Firebase.
google_sign_in_unavailable: Google sign-in is not configured for this build yet.
apple_auth_missing: Apple authentication credentials could not be obtained.
apple_provider_disabled: Apple sign-in is not enabled in Firebase.
apple_sign_in_unavailable: Apple sign-in is not available on this device or in this test environment.
settings_subtitle: Manage your app preferences and account information.
premium_settings_subtitle: Annual premium unlocks an ad-free experience and unlimited barcode scans.
profile_information_subtitle: You can update your name, phone, and address details here.
profile_save_error: Profile information could not be saved.
profile_saved: Your profile information has been updated.
privacy_policy_open_error: Privacy policy could not be opened.
contact_open_error: Mail app could not be opened.
logout_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
share_sheet_subtitle: Share the product summary on social platforms or other apps.
share_to_x_desc: Opens the share flow with a ready-to-post tweet.
share_to_facebook_desc: Sends the product link and summary to the share screen.
share_to_instagram_desc: Opens the system share flow with a ready caption.
share_to_more_desc: Share through WhatsApp, Mail, and other apps.
gs1_notice_with_origin: GS1 prefix info: {{gs1}}. The product origin field is shown separately.
gs1_notice_without_origin: Actual origin information was not found. The displayed GS1 field is the barcode registration region: {{gs1}}.
analysis_summary_additive_signal: {{count}} ingredient signals were reviewed and additive-based risk was included.
analysis_summary_api_complete: Analysis completed using API score and product grade.
analysis_summary_clean_default: No clearly risky ingredient was detected.
recommendation_beauty_high_additive: Potentially concerning components were found. Review the ingredient details before using this cosmetic product.
recommendation_beauty_high_basic: The cosmetic product appears to have a high risk level. Review the ingredients and intended use carefully.
recommendation_beauty_medium_additive: The cosmetic formula contains some components that deserve extra attention.
recommendation_beauty_medium_basic: The cosmetic product appears to be at a medium risk level.
recommendation_beauty_low_api: Based on the available data, the cosmetic product appears to be low risk.
recommendation_beauty_low_clean: The cosmetic content looks generally clean.
recommendation_food_high_additive: The product may indicate high risk both in API score and ingredient composition.
recommendation_food_high_basic: Based on the API score, the product appears to be high risk.
recommendation_food_medium_additive: The product requires moderate caution in both ingredient profile and score.
recommendation_food_medium_basic: Based on the API score, the product appears to be medium risk.
recommendation_food_low_api: Based on the API score, the product appears to be low risk.
recommendation_food_low_clean: The content looks clean and generally safe to evaluate.
home_subtitle_refined: Reach your latest scans, favorites, and live insights from a single screen.
tap_for_next_insight: Tap to switch to the next insight card
who_news_card_text: Live headline from the World Health Organization newsroom
who_news_fallback_notice: WHO does not provide an official newsroom in this app language, so headlines are shown from the English source.
who_news_refresh_helper: The card refreshes automatically, and you can tap to switch to the next WHO headline.
who_news_tap_helper: Tap the card to open the article, or use the top-right control for the next headline.
today_brief_progress: {{count}} scans were completed today. The best score currently looks like {{score}}.
today_brief_empty: No scans have been made today yet. Start the first analysis with Scan Now.
streak_focus_active: A {{count}} day streak is still going. {{days}} active days were recorded in the last 7 days.
streak_focus_empty: Scan a product today to start a new streak.
district_helper_select_city: Select a city first to see district options.
district_picker_empty: No district matched your search for the selected city.
